_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Determine essential system capabilities and business functions
reference_document_element_description: Skill in aligning data and AI program objectives to organizational strategy, translating business priorities into data and AI capability requirements with measurable outcomes.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI DG domain. Skill DG-S-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-A-002 (AB, cosine: 0.481), TF-A-001 (TF, cosine: 0.480).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.1/10 (raw 0.612). Shared vocabulary: [business]. NICE-only terms [capabilities, determine, essential, functions, system] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, aligning, capability, data, measurable, objectives] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.868 (P=0.876, R=0.859). Balanced P/R — the 7-word NICE element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:28.7%, N:71.3%, C:0.0%). No dominant classification for "Determine essential system capabilities and business functions" vs "Skill in aligning data and AI program objectives to organizational strategy, tra" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.506 < STS 0.612 (gap -0.106). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [capabilities, determine, essential] and [ai, aligning, capability] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.0%. Shared tokens: [business]. NICE-only: [capabilities, determine, essential, functions, system]. WIDAI-only: [ai, aligning, capability, data, measurable, objectives].
